name: software-leverage-points
description: Skills for reviewing software through leverage-point lenses (testing, logging, architecture, dependencies, security, and more). Includes an orchestrator that fans out parallel subagents per leverage point during planning, code review, and codebase audit.

interface.shortDescription: A mixture of experts on software design, used at plan time and PR review
interface.longDescription: Use Software Leverage Points to review plans, pull requests, and codebases through a panel of leverage-point experts: testing, logging, architecture, dependencies, security, and more. The orchestrator fans out parallel subagents, one per leverage point, and aggregates their findings into a single report.
defaultPrompt: Review this plan through the software leverage points.
Run a leverage-point review on this PR diff.
